widgetData.source_sentence: Without concerning ourselves with philosophical concepts, how would Bhagavan advise me to work towards getting, retaining and extending those rare flashes?
sentences: 40 Arunachala Ramana – Eternal Ocean of Grace apparent limitations on the Illimitable.
M.: Immanence can only be with Maya.
Does abhyasa in such experience involve retirement?

widgetData.source_sentence: D.: Can one remain without thoughts rising all the 24 hours of the day?
sentences: Even this one body is a burden.
M.: Let the question be raised after jivanmukti is gained if it is found necessary.
M.: This thought, ‘I am not able to concentrate,’ is itself an obstacle.

widgetData.source_sentence: One day, when she was trying to make appalams, she called out to Bhagavan, “Why don’t you come and help me?
sentences: M: Why do you think you are a grihastha?
Or is renunciation different, meaning cessation of the active life?
I am going to make appalams!” Blinded by her attachment to him, she wanted to satisfy his childhood desires.

widgetData.source_sentence: D.: Is there only one Self or are there more selves?
sentences: M.: This is again due to confusion; you identify the body with the Self.
Does it speak through your mouth?
How was he before being born and how will he be after death?

widgetData.source_sentence: Why did tears flow from Bhagavan’s eyes as he talked to this grandfather monkey and explained why he could not meet them?
sentences: It was a supreme force which drew me that day to Arunachala.
By speaking their power is reduced.
Yes, Bhagavan had no attachment to things or to people.
